pi_items.source: Task description and env data directory structure (/workspace/data/bologna_acosta) combined with web search confirming Bologna is a real-world scenario.
Task description exact match; file is expected to be created by running 'sumo' with --fcd-output parameter.
Task description exact match; file is created by traceExporter.py with --ns2mobility-output parameter.
Task description exact match; file is created by traceExporter.py with --ns2activity-output parameter.
Task description exact match; file is to be created containing the line count of the mobility file.
Task description specifies 'restrict ... to the first 10 minutes ... by using the --end 600 parameter'. Executing the task and checking output max timestamp gives 599.0.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on the 'Bologna' dataset, which is a real-world SUMO traffic scenario modeling the city of Bologna, Italy. The 'bologna_acosta' scenario runs successfully in SUMO. Running the scenario configuration and outputting FCD data (--fcd-output) generates an XML file of ~342MB. Executing the SUMO traceExporter.py tool on this FCD file with a 600-second limit (--end 600) produces an NS2 mobility trace file (ns2_mobility.tcl) of approximately 14MB containing exactly 252,698 lines, with a maximum recorded time of 599.0s. It also generates an NS2 activity file (ns2_activity.tcl) of 2,756 lines.
